m	Z	m
Fixer for print.
Change:
    'print'          into 'print()'
    'print ...'      into 'print(...)'
    'print ... ,'    into 'print(..., end=" ")'
    'print >>x, ...' into 'print(..., file=x)'
No changes are applied if print_function is imported from __future__
patcomp)
pytree)
token)
fixer_base)

Call
Comma
Stringz"atom< '(' [atom|STRING|NAME] ')' >c
FixPrintTzP
              simple_stmt< any* bare='print' any* > | print_stmt
              c
bare
print)

clone)
argr
